form.formComment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 300m at this track by 4 lengths in a Grade 5. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with him.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 300m at this track beaten 14 lengths (18.29) behind Amazing Bundy in a Grade 5 on April 6. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.
